resources.string: Allow Style Keyboard in system input settings so it can replace your current keyboard and apply font styles, emoji shortcuts and sounds as you type.
Full access is required only if you use an emoji-blend API or imported sound packs. The keyboard does not transmit what you type.
Accessibility is required only when the Auto Sender targets an app that does not support share-intents; it lets the service simulate taps to paste and send your script messages.
Gallery access is used to pick GIF or short video backgrounds for the keyboard.
Notifications are required so the Auto Sender can run as a foreground service and you always see when automation is active.
Visible notification while the Auto Sender is running.
